title: Dapr Job
description: Represents a Dapr scheduled job, including its schedule expression, due time, repeat count, time-to-live, and data payload for triggered execution.

schedule.description: The schedule for the job using a cron expression or duration (e.g., @every 5s).

dueTime.description: The time at which the job should be triggered (RFC 3339 or duration format).

repeats.description: The number of times the job should be triggered.

data.description: The data payload to include with the job trigger.
